query: approximate page count of War and Peace by Leo Tolstoy in commonly-cited English translations
answer: War and Peace by Leo Tolstoy typically has around 1,400 pages in commonly-cited English translations. The Penguin Classics edition is 1,440 pages. The original 1869 version is shorter.
